issues.description: Card text shows 'You may trash 1 card from your hand AND rest this Character' as prerequisites/costs for the ability, not sequential actions. The KO effect should be conditional on both costs being paid. Current DSL treats all three as independent actions in sequence.
TrashFromHand should have optional:true since text says 'You may trash'. Currently implied as mandatory.

The Rest action (Self) and TrashFromHand are costs that enable the KO, not separate effects. Both should be required conditions/costs before KO executes. Structure should reflect: Pay costs (trash 1 optional + rest self) → Then KO up to 1 opponent character with cost ≤4.
